notes: Now signed with a Developer ID and notarized by Apple — installs with no Gatekeeper warning and no --no-quarantine. GitHub Copilot CLI is a first-class agent, with its own activity trail alongside Claude, Codex, OpenCode and Antigravity. New worktree creation flow with an inline name input, and you can now carry uncommitted work between worktrees. Links in the terminal are clickable. Fixed the quick switcher not closing, plus further polish on the AI activity trails and dialogs.
